ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 25-34, 35-44) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for registration */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for registration (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the individual data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend observed in the data (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "correlation" TEXT /* Correlation observed in the data (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
